# Arthur A. Sabintsev

> Physicist, engineer, and founder. CEO of Grove. Founder of Gold Ranger Ventures. A career spanning physics, software engineering, and technology leadership.

## About
Arthur Ariel Sabintsev is a physicist turned engineer turned founder. He is the CEO of [Grove](https://grove.city) and the founder of [Gold Ranger Ventures](https://goldranger.xyz).

## Building
- [Grove](https://grove.city) (CEO)

## Tinkering
- [Gold Ranger Ventures](https://goldranger.xyz)

## Previously
- [Pocket Network](https://pocket.network) (2021–2025)
- [Capital One](https://capitalone.com) (2018–2022)
- [Washington Post](https://washingtonpost.com) (2015–2018)
- [ID.me](https://id.me) (2013–2015)
